loop1.title: PQ Issues KPI Strip (Total Issues / I-THD Events / V-THD Events / PF Gap Feeders / Neutral Stress / Worst I-THD / Worst V-THD)
loop1.note: Showing PQ event counts and worst-case metrics for outgoing feeders; 3rd harmonic, peak-THD, k-factor, and diagnosis labels are not measured by this panel's member meters.

loop1.title: Harmonics & PQ Timeline
loop1.note: Showing PF Gap and THD trends for outgoing feeders; sag/swell/neutral event counts are not directly measured by this panel's aggregate table and are omitted.

loop1.title: AI Summary
loop1.note: Roster identifiers morphed to real panel members; narrative text is generated from sibling card data.

loop1.title: Feeder PQ At {period}
loop1.note: Showing per-feeder PF and THD metrics from member meters; display thresholds (pfLow, pfHigh, pfDecimalThreshold) are static config values and not measured quantities.

loop1.title: Signature
loop1.note: Showing harmonic and power metrics for 8 primary outgoing feeders; 2 feeders (UPS-05, UPS-06) are dark (no data) and honest-blanked.
